rationale: Fam. Code §231.007 governs interception of state payments to child support debtors. The homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns local property tax appraisals. No operational overlap exists between these provisions.
quote: A person obligated to pay child support in a case in which the Title IV-D agency is providing services under this chapter who does not pay the required support is indebted to the state for the purposes of Section 403.055, Government Code
_note: No conflict. §231.007 addresses state payment interception for child support arrears; the proposed homestead exemption increase is a property tax appraisal matter with no intersection.
